name: Acesian Partners Limited
summary: Acesian Partners Limited supplies and installs environment-control exhaust systems in Singapore, Malaysia, and Europe. It operates through two segments: Manufacturing, Distribution, and Services; and Engineering Services. The company manufactures ethylene tetrafluoroethylene coated stainless steel ducts under the CMT brand; coated and uncoated stainless steel ducts; and galvanized ducts and accessories for use in heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning systems; and other specialized exhaust system components, as well as offers laboratory air flow products. It also provides turnkey facility construction management and engineering solutions; and project management and consultancy services. Further, it operates as a general contractor for building construction, plumbing, pumping, air-conditioning, and information communication technologies, including design and build audio-visual solutions, system integration, and managed services. The company was formerly known as Linair Technologies Limited and changed its name to Acesian Partners Limited in October 2015. Acesian Partners Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Singapore.
